columns.name: assets_m
columns.description: Total assets held by the company, in millions of USD, as reported in the latest balance sheet.

columns.name: best_companies_to_work_for
columns.description: A boolean value that indicates whether the company is recognized as one of the best employers by Fortune (true or false).

columns.name: ceo
columns.description: The full name of the company’s current Chief Executive Officer.

columns.name: change_in_rank
columns.description: The numeric change in the company's rank on the Fortune 500 list compared to the previous year. A positive number indicates a move up the list.

columns.name: company
columns.description: The full legal name of the company ranked on the Fortune 500 list.

columns.name: company_type
columns.description: The ownership or listing status of the company (e.g., Public, Private).

columns.name: country
columns.description: The country in which the company’s headquarters is located.

columns.name: dropped_in_rank
columns.description: Indicates whether the company moved down in ranking compared to last year (true or false).

columns.name: founder_is_ceo
columns.description: A boolean flag indicating if the company’s CEO is also its founder (true or false).

columns.name: gained_in_rank
columns.description: Indicates whether the company moved up in ranking compared to last year (true or false).

columns.name: global500
columns.description: Indicates if the company is also listed on the Fortune Global 500, which ranks the world’s largest companies by revenue.

columns.name: growth_in_jobs
columns.description: The percentage growth or decline in the company’s workforce compared to the previous year.

columns.name: headquarters_city
columns.description: The city where the company's main corporate offices or headquarters are situated.

columns.name: headquarters_state
columns.description: If located in the U.S., the state in which the company's headquarters resides.

columns.name: industry
columns.description: The specific industry classification that best describes the company’s main line of business.

columns.name: is_female_ceo
columns.description: Indicates whether the company is led by a female CEO (true or false).

columns.name: is_profitable
columns.description: Indicates whether the company reported a positive net income in its most recent fiscal year (true or false).

columns.name: market_cap_march28_m
columns.description: The company's market capitalization in millions of USD as of March 28, 2024, reflecting investor valuation.

columns.name: market_cap_updated_m
columns.description: The most recently updated market capitalization of the company, in millions of USD.

columns.name: newcomer_to_the_fortune500
columns.description: A boolean flag indicating if the company is appearing on the Fortune 500 list for the first time.

columns.name: number_of_employees
columns.description: The total number of employees working at the company worldwide, based on the latest available data.

columns.name: profits_percent_change
columns.description: The percentage change in net profit compared to the previous fiscal year.

columns.name: profits_m
columns.description: Net profit or net income reported by the company for the most recent fiscal year, in millions of USD.

columns.name: revenue_percent_change
columns.description: The year-over-year percentage change in total revenue compared to the prior fiscal year.

columns.name: revenues_m
columns.description: Total revenues earned by the company in the most recent fiscal year, measured in millions of USD.

columns.name: sector
columns.description: The broader economic sector in which the company primarily operates, such as Technology, Energy, or Retail.

columns.name: ticker
columns.description: The stock market symbol under which the company is traded on a major U.S. exchange.

columns.name: worlds_most_admired_companies
columns.description: Indicates if the company is featured in Fortune’s 'World's Most Admired Companies' list.
